title: Fix live comment sync and responsive annotation placement
description: Use PocketBase realtime-compatible updates for live comments and anchor shape geometry so desktop rectangles map correctly on responsive mobile layouts.

affected_files.reason: live sync client and responsive geometry anchoring
regression coverage for realtime and responsive geometry
public realtime event endpoint if required
collection API rule updates if required
apply realtime comment list rule to existing PocketBase deployments

doc_reason: assess existing live review plan before changing behavior

agent_notes.author: agent
agent_notes.content: Use PocketBase native /api/realtime for browser live updates. The client subscribes to review_comments/* with pageKey and publicKey query options, then refreshes the scoped public thread list when comment events arrive. Shape annotations now prefer concrete controls such as buttons as geometry anchors so responsive mobile layouts reposition rectangles with the target element instead of the page body.

metadata.reason: apply realtime comment list rule to existing PocketBase deployments
